title: Create: Crushing and Recycling everything
description: This mod adds new recipes for Create. Crushing and Recycling everything!
body:
# About
This mod adds ability to crushing practically **everything**!
For example: have you found an anvil in the structure, but you already have it? Crush!
**To view recipes you need to download JEI.**
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b816eb91863d2c542de55dbe55d957e9568f9724.png)
